mapper.select: select count(1) as totalBatchCount, coalesce(sum(b.stock_quantity), 0) as totalStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiredBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiredStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval #{expiringSoonDays} day) and b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval #{expiringSoonDays} day) and b.status != 0 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.status = 2 or b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity then 1 else 0 end), 0) as soldOutBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.status in (1, 2) then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as saleableStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price else 0 end), 0) as estimatedLossAmount, (select coalesce(sum(o.amount), 0) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as revenueAmount, (select count(1) from orders) as orderCount, (select count(1) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as paidOrderCount, (select coalesce(sum(od.number), 0) from order_detail od inner join orders o on o.id = od.order_id where o.pay_status = 1) as soldItemQuantity, (select coalesce(avg(o.amount), 0) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as averageOrderAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id

select count(1) as totalBatchCount, coalesce(sum(b.stock_quantity), 0) as totalStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiredBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiredStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < dateadd('DAY', #{expiringSoonDays}, now()) and b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < dateadd('DAY', #{expiringSoonDays}, now()) and b.status != 0 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.status = 2 or b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity then 1 else 0 end), 0) as soldOutBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.status in (1, 2) then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as saleableStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price else 0 end), 0) as estimatedLossAmount, (select coalesce(sum(o.amount), 0) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as revenueAmount, (select count(1) from orders) as orderCount, (select count(1) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as paidOrderCount, (select coalesce(sum(od.number), 0) from order_detail od inner join orders o on o.id = od.order_id where o.pay_status = 1) as soldItemQuantity, (select coalesce(avg(o.amount), 0) from orders o where o.pay_status = 1) as averageOrderAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id

select c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, count(1) as batchCount, coalesce(sum(b.stock_quantity), 0) as totalStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval #{expiringSoonDays} day) and b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.status = 2 or b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity then 1 else 0 end), 0) as soldOutBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiredStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price else 0 end), 0) as estimatedLossAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id group by c.id, c.name order by estimatedLossAmount desc, batchCount desc

select c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, count(1) as batchCount, coalesce(sum(b.stock_quantity), 0) as totalStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time >= now() and b.expiration_time < dateadd('DAY', #{expiringSoonDays}, now()) and b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end), 0) as expiringSoonBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.status = 2 or b.stock_quantity <= b.sold_quantity then 1 else 0 end), 0) as soldOutBatchCount, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) else 0 end), 0) as expiredStockQuantity, coalesce(sum(case when b.expiration_time < now() or b.status = 3 then greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price else 0 end), 0) as estimatedLossAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id group by c.id, c.name order by estimatedLossAmount desc, batchCount desc

select b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, c.name as categoryName, datediff(b.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableStock, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price as estimatedLossAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id where b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 and b.expiration_time < date_add(now(), interval #{expiringSoonDays} day) order by daysToExpire asc, estimatedLossAmount desc, b.id desc limit #{limit}

select b.id as batchId, b.batch_code as batchCode, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, c.name as categoryName, datediff('DAY', now(), b.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) as availableStock, greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) * p.price as estimatedLossAmount from inventory_batch b left join product p on p.id = b.product_id left join category c on c.id = p.category_id where b.status != 0 and greatest(b.stock_quantity - b.locked_quantity - b.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 and b.expiration_time < dateadd('DAY', #{expiringSoonDays}, now()) order by daysToExpire asc, estimatedLossAmount desc, b.id desc limit #{limit}
